name: UNITED FIRE GROUP INC
business: United Fire Group, Inc. and its subsidiaries are engaged in the business of writing property and casualty insurance through a network of independent agencies. The company's primary commercial policies include fire and allied lines, other liability, automobile, workers' compensation, and surety bonds. It also participates in reinsurance and Lloyd's of London syndicates.
sellsTo: middle market businesses in construction, services, retail trade, financial and manufacturing

exposures.sentence: Founded in 1946, United Fire Group, Inc. ("UFG", the "Registrant", the "Company", "we", "us", or "our") and its subsidiaries are engaged in the business of writing property and casualty insurance through a network of independent agencies.
Unauthorized data access, cyber attacks and other security breaches could have an adverse impact on our business and reputation.
Emerging technology, including artificial intelligence, offers opportunities to underwrite and price business more efficiently and accurately, thus lowering costs.
